mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_USER.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_USER (ID, USER_EMAIL, USER_PASSWORD, USER_PROFILE, USER_NAME, USER_NICKNAME) VALUES (#{id}, #{userEmail}, #{userPassword}, #{userProfile}, #{userName}, #{userNickname})
mapper.select: SELECT TBU.ID, TBU.USER_EMAIL, TBU.USER_PASSWORD, TBU.USER_PROFILE, TBU.USER_NAME, TBU.USER_NICKNAME, TBSU.SOCIAL_USER_PROVIDER_ID, TBSU.SOCIAL_USER_PROVIDER, TBSU.USER_ID FROM TBL_USER TBU JOIN TBL_SOCIAL_USER TBSU ON TBU.ID = TBSU.USER_ID WHERE TBU.ID = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_USER SET USER_EMAIL = #{userEmail}, USER_PASSWORD = #{userPassword}, USER_PROFILE = #{userProfile}, USER_NAME = #{userName}, USER_NICKNAME = #{userNickname} WHERE ID = #{id}
